title: hesperis livida
intro: Hesperis livida, also known as the purple-flowered rocket, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hesperis livida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Hesperis livida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
